headline: These 4 Dividend Growers Have Already Declared 10% Dividend Increases
summary: Morningstar’s Investing Insights podcast recently spotlighted four S&P 500 stocks that have already declared dividend increases of 10% or more, effectively locking in their place on next year’s Dividend Growers screen, which requires companies to grow dividends at least 10% annually.
